# Schemas

- Parent: [../README.md](../README.md)

- [verification-bundle.schema.json](./verification-bundle.schema.json) — Arena 5 merge-bot bundle (see [docs/AUTONOMOUS_MUTATION_ZERO_TRUST.md](../docs/AUTONOMOUS_MUTATION_ZERO_TRUST.md)).
- [ecology-graph-snapshot.schema.json](./ecology-graph-snapshot.schema.json) — bounded pilot graph export (see [docs/ECOLOGY_PILOT_SPEC.md](../docs/ECOLOGY_PILOT_SPEC.md)).

## Getting Started

- **What:** JSON schemas for verification bundles and exported graph snapshots.
- **Why:** they keep cross-tool data contracts explicit and machine-checkable.
- **How:** validate data against the schema named by the producing or consuming feature before changing fixture shape.
- **Next:** follow each schema link to the doc that explains its workflow.
